title: LAAS
tagline: 190,000 trees. Zero image assets. One model.
description: A fully procedural 4x4km open world running in the browser on WebGPU (three.js, TSL materials, raw WGSL compute). Built roughly 99% autonomously by Claude Fable 5 across long sessions, including its own QA via headless screenshot testing. Requires a recent Chrome with WebGPU support.
prompt: Build a fully procedural open world (4km+) matching UE5-class reference frames, with hard constraints on triangle counts, system list, and world size, and with no black shadows, no cloned trees, and no fog used as a cover-up
creator: Braffolk

title: Sunset Flap
tagline: Flappy Bird, but make it pretty.
description: A polished 3D reimagining of Flappy Bird with smooth controls and warm, atmospheric lighting, generated from a single prompt.
prompt: Create a webbed Flappy Bird video game, but 3D and I want it to look pretty and playable.
creator: 5kahoisaac

title: Slice
description: A fruit-slicing arcade game in the spirit of Fruit Ninja, generated from a single prompt.
creator: Ghostwritten
